subsystems.ENGINE_ROTARY: Mazda R26B 4-Rotor Wankel. 2616cc. Variable Intake Telescopic Pipes.
subsystems.LEGACY_DATA: First Japanese manufacturer to win 24 Hours of Le Mans (1991).
subsystems.BODYWORK: Carbon fiber/kevlar composite. Renown livery serialization.
subsystems.THROTTLE_MAP: Linear mechanical cable. No traction aids. Pure analog input.
